cases.input: Both GitNexus and code-review-graph pass build/status/query proof in a selected Git repo.
cases.expected_output: workflow_mode=primary, overall_status=ready, query_ready=true for ready providers, canonical graph and impact artifacts written under the selected repo.

cases.input: GitNexus build/status succeed, but all expected-hit query candidates return definitions-only evidence.
cases.expected_output: GitNexus graph_ready=true and query_ready=false, status=query-unverified, definitions-only kept as file/symbol pointer evidence.

cases.input: All child repos run; one code-bearing child is ready and one README-only child has expected_hit=false.
cases.expected_output: Parent summary includes counts.not_applicable and does not count the README-only child as degraded or action_required.

cases.input: CLI readiness is query-unverified and the current session exposes GitNexus MCP.
cases.expected_output: Final handoff reports compiled artifacts first, then one session-local live MCP probe table without mutating compiled readiness facts.

cases.input: A child repo was dirty during bootstrap and still has the same git status fingerprint when the resolver runs.
cases.expected_output: Resolver keeps the compiled child status; only missing or mismatched worktree_status_hash becomes dirty-uncertain.
